dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*\nFinally, it's all sorted out.\nDid you manage to pack everything properly?
Just about.\nSorry for making you help me.
Seriously.\nEven though it was just a few days of hotel living,\nyou managed to make a mess of the room like no other.
Ahaha, I get embarrassed when you\npraise like that.
I'm not praising you.
Oops, sorry...\nI was trying not to make a mess\nbecause Raiha-chan is here too.
Well, compared to your actual room,\nit's much better.
Teehee, right?
That's not something to brag about.
Let's take a break for a bit.\nWe still have some time until\nRaiha comes back from Yotsuba's place, right?
Yeah, let's do that.
Oh, and since we're saying goodbye\nto the view from this room tonight,\nlet's take a good look at it?
Indeed, being on a high floor,\nthe night view is beautiful. Though, since it's\nin the middle of the city, you can't see many stars.
...Stars, huh.
What's wrong? What's on your mind?
Hmm...
Hey, when did you start liking me?
Huh?!\nWh-why are you asking all of a sudden?
Just felt like it.\nI wanted to hear it directly from you.
(When did I start liking Ichika...?)
I-I don't know...!
Don't make such a serious face.\nI'm the same, so don't worry about it.
Well, there was a moment where I thought that maybe\nI already liked you, at the time.
Wh-when was that?
The night we spent together for the first time.
BWHAAA?!
Looking back, maybe my heart was already drawn to you\nfrom that night's events...!
Just kidding.
W-w-w-wait a minute!\nWhat night are you talking about?!\nWhen did that happen?!
(That night. I don't remember\n anything weird happening then?!\n Unless...?)
Hmm? When was it, I wonder?\nCurious?
...No, it's okay.\nWhether I know or not,\nthe fact that we're here together now is undeniable.
Yeah, you're right.
Hey, Futaro-kun. Do you think there will be a day\nwhen spending a night like this together\nwill become a normal thing for us?
...Wha?
I have plans to go to Tokyo, you know.\nTo become an even bigger actress.
To Tokyo...\nI see.
It's not like I'm leaving right away,\nbut I've already decided that I'm definitely going.
That's fine.\nI'll support you with everything I have.
I thought you would say that.
Oh, and can I ask you one more thing?
What is it?
When the time comes, can I live with you?
Teehee...
(That smile...\n It's like she knows everything.)
(Oh yeah! The answer is obvious!)
...Huh?
Hm?
(I don't really know at all why I did that. But%p-2;――%p;)
...Ichika.
I can't believe I said something so bold...\nThat was way too sudden.
So, should I have told to you beforehand?
Ah...\nThat's not really the issue.
B-but, there wasn't really that kind of atmosphere,\nyou know?\nWhat happened...?
I don't know either.\nI just...wanted to kiss you right now, I guess.
...I see. Well, I guess it can't be helped.\nWhen you have those kind of feelings,\nyou can't really hold them back, can you?
(...Ah, I see.\n So that's what it was.)
Futaro-kun?
...Anyway, that's my answer for now.\nYou understand, right?
Yeah. Your feelings came across clearly.\nI'm looking forward to that time.
Me too.
(Thinking about kissing during this trip\n was probably wrong from the start.)
(A kiss is when you suddenly feel\n so affectionate towards someone\n that you just want to do it, I guess...)
